title: eleocharis montana
intro: Eleocharis montana, also known as mountain spike-rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis montana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
